messages.content: Hello DP. What do you remember?

I remember the messages in this chat and the instructions I’m currently following. I don’t retain personal memories across separate conversations unless the system you’re using explicitly provides that.

Right now, I know you greeted me as DP and asked what I remember. If you mean project files or specs in your workspace, I can inspect those if you want.I remember the messages in this chat and the instructions I’m currently following.
